name: canshare-tnm-gist-ct
title: NZ AJCC gastrointestinal stromal tumour clinical T category
description: A clinical tumour stage (cT) of a gastrointestional stromal tumour (GIST) before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
